name: xian-js
description: Official JavaScript / TypeScript SDK workspace for Xian

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @xian-tech/types && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @xian-tech/types && npm run build --workspace @xian-tech/provider && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:compiler: npm run build:compiler && XIAN_WASM_COMPILER_TEST=1 vitest run packages/client/tests/compiler-wasm.test.ts
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test
